title: PreviewCard
description: One of the 26 preview cards produced in PreviewDD Stage 2 by an Advocate.

spec_alignment_notes.description: (v1.6.0+, A-6 v1.7.0 required) Advocate's reasoning for **every** spec field interpretation — including the trivial/matching cases. Format: 'X field=Y → chose Z because ...' or 'X field unknown → assumed Y because Z'. Required even when every spec field was already populated, because I2 Diversity Validator lints framework-convergence (see A-6 acceptance in umbrella #31) against this text. Empty string is NOT acceptable; use a short explicit note like 'all fields populated, followed spec verbatim' if no interpretation was needed.
